entries.title: Realistic Casual Mirror Selfie
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a highly realistic casual mirror selfie of a young East Asian woman standing in a minimalist beige bedroom, photographed vertically on a smartphone. She has long dark brown slightly wavy hair and a slim figure, with her face intentionally obscured by a soft square blur for privacy. She is wearing a white ribbed camisole with lace trim and a small bow, an oversized cream chunky knit cardigan slipping off one shoulder, and light blue high-waisted denim shorts with frayed hems. Her pose is relaxed and fashionable, one shoulder exposed, one hand raised near her face with the sweater sleeve covering part of her hand, looking like a natural social media outfit photo rather than a studio portrait. The room has warm neutral lighting, a cream sofa behind her, plain off-white walls, a few small photo prints taped to the wall, a narrow black-framed full-length mirror visible at the edges, a glass side table on the right, and a soft beige rug. Use realistic proportions, natural skin texture, soft indoor daylight, muted tones, shallow everyday smartphone quality, and an authentic non-AI Japanese lifestyle aesthetic.

entries.title: Romantic Couple Travel Album Grid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Please based on the real photos of two adults I uploaded, generate a 'Couple Seaside Travel Film-style Snapshot Album Collage'. Strictly preserve the real identity characteristics of both people. Both the woman and the man must look like themselves in the uploaded photos, including face shape, facial feature proportions, eye structure, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, age, hairline, hairstyle characteristics, and overall temperament. The woman has a B-cup chest. Do not turn them into Caucasian faces, avoid influencer-style aesthetics, do not over-beautify, and do not replace them with strangers. Ultimately, all small photos must feature the same couple, captured as if by mobile phones, point-and-shoot cameras, or friends across various travel scenes. Format: A 4x4 collage with 16 small photos. Narrow black dividers between photos on a black background, with large black margins at the top and bottom, resembling a memory dump from a phone album, Instagram, or Xiaohongshu. Avoid polished professional layouts or commercial posters. Core Visual Style: Nostalgic film + old iPhone snapshot + couple's travel album. Include slight film grain, shadow noise, slight out-of-focus, motion blur, compression, occasional overexposure/backlighting, unstable lighting, and imperfect composition. Warm tones, natural skin, faded greens/blues, and grayish blacks, resembling phone vacation photos from 2016-2021. Not high-def, clean, or over-sharpened. Film Filter: Slight Kodak/Fuji disposable camera style. Light grain, warm yellow highlights, soft glows, and light night noise. Should look like real old photos rather than heavy modern templates. Relationship: A close, natural couple with life-like interactions: holding hands, selfies, eye contact, hugging, leaning on shoulders, kissing cheeks, eating, and walking together. Intimate but not erotic or vulgar. Travel Scene: Summer seaside city vacation with Mediterranean, Greek island, or Italian coastal vibes. Scenes include beaches, hotel mirrors, sunsets, restaurants, balconies, docks, and night cityscapes. These should feel like life fragments rather than tourist check-ins. 16 Grid Contents: 1. Beach selfie, close-up, strong sunlight, slightly overexposed. 2. Woman sitting alone in a cafe, hair windblown, friend's perspective snapshot. 3. Man walking away on a white town street, evening stroll feel. 4. Mirror selfie in a hotel bathroom, dim light, some noise. 5. Woman smiling back on a beach, summer outfit, waves in background. 6. Extreme close-up selfie, blurry, woman eyes closed, man near her cheek. 7. Woman's profile at sunset looking at the sea, grain and low contrast. 8. Man sitting by the pier or cafe looking relaxed at the camera. 9. Night walk hand-in-hand, motion blur, warm lighting. 10. Man sitting by the pool/sea, half-body shot, relaxed expression. 11. Selfie together, hair messy, slightly out of focus but high emotion. 12. Man taking a photo of the woman, travel documentary style. 13. Laughing loudly in a close-up selfie, accidental shot feel. 14. Man eating street food, natural and simple hand movements. 15. Woman on a balcony at night looking back, city light background, night noise. 16. Beach selfie, kissing cheek, last-day commemorative photo. Consistency Requirements: Maintain identical looks for the couple in every grid across all changes in clothes and light. No facial drift or distortion in side views or night shots. Hand Stability: Avoid fingers near the face. No complex gestures or hair-grabbing to prevent AI deformation. Hands should be naturally placed. Expression and Poses: Variety is key: selfies, profile shots, back views, eating, and walking. Avoid constant smiling at the camera. Quality: Real old iPhone album feel with low resolution, grain, compression, and imperfect composition. Restrictions: No deformed fingers, extra limbs, weird text, or watermarks. No nudity or minor-looking subjects. Avoid 'AI plastic' faces. Final Output: A 4x4 couple travel album collage, 1:1 ratio, black background, nostalgic film/old iPhone style, showcasing intimate, relaxed, and authentic summer vacation memories.

entries.title: Taiwan Breakfast Shop Candid Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid smartphone photo of a young East Asian woman seated at a small round table inside a busy old-fashioned Taiwanese breakfast shop. She is the main subject, framed from mid-thigh upward, facing the camera in a casual seated pose. Her face is intentionally obscured with a soft rectangular blur. She has straight shoulder-length black hair with a center part, small gold hoop earrings, and a delicate gold necklace with a tiny heart pendant. She wears a fitted white spaghetti-strap tank top and high-waisted blue denim cutoff shorts with light distressing. In one hand she holds a piece of fried cruller near her mouth, and in the other hand she holds another broken piece over the table. On the table are 4 visible food and drink items: a plate with fried cruller pieces, a wrapped scallion pancake with black sesame seeds, a white foam takeout tray containing 2 pancakes including one covered with dark soy-based sauce and chopped scallions, and a large takeaway cup of soy milk with a red straw and red Chinese logo. The restaurant interior is compact and brightly lit with fluorescent ceiling lights, terrazzo-style flooring, and tightly packed diners in the background. Behind her are large windows and wall signage with bold red traditional Chinese characters, including breakfast items such as soy milk, youtiao, rice rolls, shaobing, and egg pancake. There are several seated customers eating, staff working behind a metal counter, a small wall-mounted television showing a female news anchor, and a hanging menu board with red Chinese text and prices. Realistic photography, natural indoor lighting, shallow depth of field, lively local atmosphere, slight wide-angle phone camera perspective, documentary food-travel aesthetic.

entries.title: Xuanwu Gate Incident Moments Post
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A humorous, highly detailed composite image showing a modern smartphone displaying a Chinese social-media Moments post about the Xuanwu Gate Incident, placed on the left side of the frame, with the posted battle image expanded into a large cinematic historical scene filling the right side. The phone should look like a black iPhone with thin bezels and a top notch, shown front-facing. On the phone screen, the app header bar is dark gray-black and reads "朋友圈" in white, with a back arrow on the left and a camera icon on the right. Below it is a social post from 唐王世民, with a small square profile avatar of an ancient Chinese warrior in armor and helmet. Under the name is a location pin and the text "长安·玄武门", and a timestamp line "唐武德九年六月初四 巳时". The main post text in Chinese says: "吾为国家除逆贼,请社稷。今日玄武门,功在千秋!⚔️💪". Beneath the text is a square battle image preview matching the large scene on the right. Below the image is a metadata row showing exactly three items: "3.8万次浏览", "赞 (666)", and "(128)" beside a comment icon. Under that is a comments box with exactly 5 visible commenters, each with a tiny avatar and Chinese text styled like supportive social-media replies from historical figures. The comments should include these names in Chinese: "尉迟恭", "房玄龄", "李渊", "杜如晦", and "长孙无忌", with the tone praising the success of the action; one comment line should suggest the emperor is shocked and the state is secured. The right side is a dramatic Tang-dynasty battle painting at sunset outside 玄武门, with a massive gray stone gate tower and the gate plaque reading "玄武门". In the center foreground, a mounted armored archer in red-plumed helmet draws a bow while riding a brown horse; around him are exactly 7 clearly visible mounted or standing soldiers in Tang armor, plus 1 fallen armored figure on the ground pointing upward. Multiple yellow battle flags with the large black character "唐" wave through the dust; show at least 4 visible flags. Arrows fly through the sky, horses rear and turn, and the air is filled with dust, warm sunset light, and battlefield motion. The visual style is realistic historical epic key art with painterly detail, but the overall concept is comedic and anachronistic because it presents an ancient coup as a social-media朋友圈 post. Keep all visible interface text in Chinese, maintain believable mobile UI spacing, and blend the phone mockup with the expanded battle artwork in one widescreen composition.

entries.title: ChatGPT App Showing WeChat Moments Screenshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic dark-mode smartphone screenshot of the ChatGPT mobile app in Chinese, shown full screen on a black background with an iPhone-style status bar. The top status bar shows the time 20:57 on the left, small cellular signal, Wi‐Fi, and battery icons on the right, with the battery reading 61. Below it is the ChatGPT conversation header with a left menu icon, the title ChatGPT, a pencil/edit icon, and a three-dot menu icon. In the chat area, show 1 user message bubble in Chinese reading "生成一张微信朋友圈截图,随机生成用户名和分享内容", displayed as a rounded dark gray bubble aligned to the right. Beneath it, show an assistant response area with the Chinese text "图片已创建". Under that, display 1 generated image preview: a tall rounded-rectangle screenshot mockup of a WeChat Moments page on a white phone screen. Inside the generated image, include a top bar with the time 20:42 and the title "朋友圈". Show 2 separate Moments posts. The first post has a female profile photo and the username "星星都不醒", followed by a short Chinese caption about life and weekends, then a 3x3 collage containing exactly 9 square images: sunset over water, flowers, plated food, a tree-lined road, a white fluffy dog, a warm glowing lamp, green fruit or dessert, pink clouds or sky, and a silhouette shadow photo. Below it, include a timestamp line "2小时前", a likes row with exactly 3 usernames, and a comments block with exactly 3 short Chinese comments. The second post has a male profile photo and the username "山川与海", followed by a short fitness-themed Chinese caption with a green check emoji and flexed biceps emoji, then exactly 1 gym mirror selfie image, and a timestamp line "3小时前" with a likes row beneath. Outside the generated image preview but still within the ChatGPT app screenshot, show a horizontal row of 4 action icons below the image: thumbs up, thumbs down, share/export, and more. At the bottom of the screen, include the ChatGPT input bar in dark mode with a circular plus button on the left, placeholder text "询问 ChatGPT", a microphone icon, and a round voice button on the right. Use authentic mobile UI proportions, crisp typography, realistic Chinese app interface details, and photorealistic screenshot rendering so it looks like a genuine capture of the ChatGPT app displaying an AI-generated WeChat Moments screenshot.

entries.title: Realistic Friends Trip Selfie at Lake Ashi
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid, smartphone-style travel selfie of five Japanese female college students standing closely together at the shore of Lake Ashi, Hakone, shot at arm's length with a slightly wide-angle front camera feel. They are grouped tightly shoulder-to-shoulder, smiling and making peace signs toward the camera, with a casual cheerful friends-on-a-trip mood. Their styling is realistic and contemporary, with dark brown to black medium-to-long hair, natural makeup, and soft autumn outfits in light neutral tones: cream and white knit sweaters, a blue denim jacket, and a black shoulder bag visible near the center-right. Behind them is a lakeside scenic background with calm blue water, distant mountains under a bright sky with scattered clouds, and a wooden tourist signboard on the right side that clearly includes the Japanese text 芦ノ湖 and a smaller elevation marking reading 724M. Composition should look like an authentic social-media travel photo, slightly cropped at the edges as if one person is holding the phone from the left, with natural daylight, realistic skin tones, soft depth, and documentary-style photo realism. Include exactly three visible peace-sign hand gestures. Make it feel like a believable group souvenir photo taken during a day trip in Japan.

entries.title: Japanese app onboarding promo mockup
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean modern app-promo poster on a very pale mint-blue background, centered and vertically composed like a landing page screenshot for a Japanese inventory app. At the top, place a small rounded white pill logo with soft shadow reading Zaiko in green. Beneath it, add a smaller rounded outlined badge with a blue dot and the text "02 初回ガイド". Below that, set a large bold Japanese headline in dark navy: 初回ガイドで、すぐ使える。, followed by a smaller gray subtitle: "起動したら管理の流れをやさしく案内". Under the subtitle, show exactly 3 small rounded white category chips with soft shadows, evenly spaced: "サンプル" with a green dot, "使い方" with a blue dot, and "すぐ開始" with a dark dot. In the center, show a realistic modern smartphone mockup front view with a black bezel, slightly rounded corners, subtle reflections, and a dramatic soft blue glow under it. The phone screen displays the app UI with a green top bar and the title "Zaiko" in white, iPhone-style status icons at top, and a dimmed app interface behind a centered onboarding modal card. The white modal has rounded corners and a soft drop shadow, with a pale green circular icon area containing a green cube symbol at top. Then a bold welcome title in Japanese, "Zaikoへようこそ!", a smaller subtitle "消耗品管理アプリ", and body text "このアプリは、おうちの消耗品を管理するよ!". Add a light gray rounded list box containing exactly 3 sample inventory items on separate lines with tiny icons: "トイレットペーパー", "シャンプー", and "洗剤". Below that, add a small green-highlighted sentence: "『そろそろ買わなきゃ!』を教えてくれるから、買い忘れなし ✨". At the bottom of the modal, include a large rounded green primary button labeled 使い方を見る with a small book icon, and below it a muted text link "スキップ". Behind the modal, the app UI should be visible but subdued: a green header, side category strips, and a bottom tab bar with exactly 3 tabs labeled "ホーム", "買い物リスト", and "設定", each with simple white icons. Beneath the phone, place a large rounded blue callout card with soft shadow and a centered white pill label reading はじめての設定も迷わない. Use a polished Apple-style SaaS marketing aesthetic, soft gradients, subtle shadows, rounded UI elements, crisp typography, and a friendly trustworthy feel.
entries.description: This generates a polished Japanese mobile app marketing visual featuring a smartphone mockup and onboarding screen, ideal for landing pages, app store assets, or social media promotion.

entries.title: AI Headshot App Store Promo Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a polished App Store promotional poster for an AI headshot app called Shine, in a warm minimalist brand style. Use a vertical smartphone screenshot ad layout on a soft beige background with a curved golden-yellow shape rising from the bottom edge. Place a large elegant black serif headline in the upper left, split across 3 lines, reading Create pro headshots with Shine. Add a white jagged starburst badge to the left-center with black serif text reading Before + After. On the right side, show a large angled modern smartphone mockup, slightly tilted left, with thin metallic edges and a realistic screen. The phone display should show the app interface for AI-generated professional headshots. At the top of the screen, include a small wordmark reading SHINE, a large serif subheadline saying "Your best self, professionally.", supporting body text saying "Upload a few photos and we'll create studio-quality headshots.", a small rounded pill in the upper right that says "⚡ 8 credits", and an iPhone-style status bar showing 9:41. In the middle of the phone screen, show a before-and-after comparison card with 2 portrait panels side by side, each labeled exactly once: 1 left label "Before" and 1 right label "After". The left portrait is a casual man in a dark T-shirt against a plain indoor background; the right portrait is the same man transformed into a professional headshot wearing a dark blazer over a light shirt with a warm studio bokeh background. Put a circular swap arrow button centered between the 2 panels. Below that, include a "HOW IT WORKS" section with exactly 3 steps arranged vertically: 1) "1. Upload" with the text "Add 8-12 clear photos of yourself.", 2) "2. We create" with the text "Our AI generates a variety of pro headshots.", 3) "3. Download" with the text "Choose your favorites and download high-res images." Give each step a rounded square pastel icon tile in peach or pink tones. Near the bottom of the phone screen, add a large rounded yellow CTA button reading Start Shine ✦, and beneath it small text saying "8 credits per session". In the lower left foreground, place a cute stylized white mascot character with a rounded body, tiny arms, blush cheeks, dot eyes, and a smiling mouth, wearing a golden-yellow cowboy hat and matching neckerchief; the oversized hat should extend toward the center and overlap the base area in front of the phone. Use soft 3D illustration for the mascot, premium UI design for the phone screen, consistent beige-and-gold branding, subtle shadows, clean spacing, and a refined startup-marketing aesthetic.
entries.description: A branded mobile app marketing visual showing an AI headshot app interface, before-and-after results, and a cute mascot, suitable for App Store screenshots or launch campaigns.

entries.title: Neon Hand Holding Smartphone Mockup
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A minimalist studio product photograph of a single human hand holding a modern smartphone upright in portrait orientation against a smooth lavender-to-pink gradient background. The composition is centered slightly left, with the forearm entering from the lower right corner and the hand wrapping naturally around the phone, fingers visible along the left edge and thumb on the right side. Use dramatic neon gel lighting with cool blue light on the left side of the hand and deep magenta-purple shadows on the right, creating a moody futuristic tech-ad aesthetic. The phone should resemble a premium edge-to-edge device with a black bezel, rounded corners, and a pill-shaped front camera cutout at the top. On the screen, show a clean monochrome landing page for a design-tech product: a small abstract black logo in the upper left, a rounded small button labeled "Menu" in the upper right, 2 wide pale rectangular placeholder content blocks stacked near the top, and centered onboarding text in the lower half. The main headline reads Welcome to the future of design with Terot. Below it, smaller gray body text reads Create intelligent design systems and AI-powered visual experiences.. Beneath that, include exactly 2 call-to-action elements: a rounded outlined button labeled Create account and a simple text link underneath labeled Login. The overall style is sleek, high-end, editorial, and cinematic, with soft shadows, realistic skin texture, subtle screen glow, and generous negative space.

entries.title: Hyperrealistic iPhone 17 Pro Max Ad
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A hyperrealistic Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max advertisement shot in a dark, moody editorial style. A young stylish woman with a warm complexion and soft upswept brunette hair, wearing a dusty mauve velvet off-shoulder mini dress, thigh-high taupe suede heeled boots, and a thin black choker necklace, is captured mid-pose extending her arm forward holding an iPhone 17 Pro Max toward the camera in a confident selfie gesture. The phone - featuring a titanium Desert Sand finish with a flush quad-lens camera system and a edge-to-edge ProMotion display glowing with vivid color - dominates the center of the frame. The composition uses shallow depth of field with tack-sharp focus on the phone screen and extended arm, soft cinematic blur on the background figure. The near-black charcoal background is layered with subtle urban texture - faint graffiti strokes in electric yellow and muted olive barely visible through a heavy dark vignette. Multiple rows of ultra-small all-caps typographic text orbit the phone at different angles reading phrases like "EVERY ANGLE. EVERY MOMENT. EVERY YOU." and "THE SHOT YOU NEVER MISS" - some running vertically, some at 30-degree angles, creating a chaotic yet intentional graphic zine energy. At the upper right, the Apple logo appears in clean brushed silver against the dark background. At the top center, a thin horizontal navigation-style text bar reads "PRO CAMERA · TITANIUM BUILD · BEYOND INTELLIGENCE" in spaced all-caps serif font. A large commanding headline is placed center-right - "CAPTURE" in massive ultra-bold white letters followed by "EVERYTHING" in lighter weight creating dramatic type hierarchy. Small yellow plus (+) symbols and diagonal arrows (↗) scattered throughout as accent details. Bottom left features a bold slogan lockup: "YOUR WORLD. entries.prompt:

[Calendar] The background of the calendar portion should be white for readability.
[Image] Everyday photos taken by amateurs with an iPhone, themed after the seasons of each month.

[Location] Leave to AI according to the season.

[Angle] Randomly select one for each month: eye, low, high, side, back.
[Exposure/Tone] Randomly select one for each month: overexp, natural, warm, cool, dark.
[Hairstyle] Randomly select one for each month: ponytail, bun, down, half_up, messy, wet, short, bob, braid, twin.
[Clothing] Leave to AI according to the season.
[Noise] Randomly select one for each month: low, mid, high, film.
[Blur/Focus] Randomly select one for each month: sharp, slight, motion, soft.
[Pose] Randomly select one for each month: natural_stand, sitting, walking, phone, wall_lean, crouch, look_back.
[Holding] Randomly select one for each month: none, smartphone, bottle, coffee, umbrella, bag, towel, script.
[Time of day] Randomly select one for each month: early_morning, morning, noon, afternoon, evening, night, late_night.

entries.title: Neumorphic Smart Dashboard UI
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean neumorphic mobile dashboard UI mockup shown straight-on, centered on a soft light gray background, inside a white rounded smartphone frame with subtle embossed shadows and glossy soft highlights. The interface uses a minimalist white-on-white design with teal green and warm orange accent colors. At the very top of the phone, include a small circular menu button on the left, a centered speaker slit and front camera dot, and status icons on the right showing Wi‐Fi, signal, 100%, and battery. The main layout contains 12 distinct UI modules: 1 large time card at upper left showing "AM", "10:24", and "Friday, May 24" with three tiny pagination dots beneath; 1 weather card at upper right showing a soft 3D partly cloudy sun icon, "24°", "Partly Cloudy", and "New York"; 4 small circular action buttons in one row under the time card, showing a grid icon, heart, bell, and gear, with the grid button filled in dark teal; 1 slim horizontal slider card to the right of those buttons with a droplet icon, "40%", and a teal progress bar; 1 large circular volume control occupying the left middle area, with a thick beveled silver knob, a surrounding tick-mark ring split into teal on the left and orange on the right, a short orange indicator line near the upper right, tiny speaker icons on both sides, and a pill label reading "VOLUME"; 1 music player card on the right middle with square album art in dark teal waves, the title "Ocean Drive", subtitle "Miami Nights", a thin orange playback progress line with times "1:45" and "3:48", and three circular transport controls for previous, play, and next, with the play button filled teal; 3 small rounded buttons in a row beneath the music player, showing an equalizer icon filled teal, a broadcast icon, and sliders icon; 1 compass card at lower left with small circular buttons in the top corners, heading text "320° NW" above, and a detailed analog compass with N, E, S, W letters and a teal-and-orange needle pointing northwest; 1 equalizer card at lower right with four vertical sliders, scale markings "+12", "0", "-12", and bottom frequency labels "60", "250", "1K", "4K", "16K", using orange slider stems and white knobs; and 5 bottom dock controls: an orange circular power button, a small Bluetooth button, a central pill waveform panel, a crescent moon button, and a sun brightness button. Use soft ambient shadows, gentle inner embossing, rounded corners, precise spacing, and a premium futuristic smart-home or control-center aesthetic inspired by high-end dribbble neumorphism, ultra-detailed, crisp vector UI, realistic depth, polished product presentation.

entries.title: Realistic X-Style French Profile Screen
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly realistic smartphone app screenshot mockup of a social media interface almost identical to X/Twitter, shown on an iPhone-style full-screen display with rounded corners against a dark blue-black background. The status bar at the top shows the time 9:41 on the left and cellular, Wi‐Fi, and battery icons on the right. The screen displays a French-language profile page for Marie Dubois, with a large cover photo of the Eiffel Tower and the Seine at sunset under a dramatic orange-blue sky. A circular profile photo overlaps the lower-left of the header, partially obscuring the face. A back arrow button appears in a dark translucent circle at top left, and a three-dot menu button in a matching circle at top right. Below the header, show the verified profile name Marie Dubois with a blue verification badge, the handle @MarieDubois, a short bio in French reading "Journaliste | Paris" on one line and "✨ Curieuse & voyageuse" on the next, then "Rejoint en mai 2012" beneath. Show follower stats in French: "1 245 Abonnements" and "32,8 k Abonnés". Add a tab bar with exactly 4 tabs labeled "Publications", "Réponses", "Médias", and "J'aime", with "Publications" selected and underlined in blue. In the feed, include exactly 3 visible posts. Post 1 is by Marie Dubois with blue verified badge and the French caption Balade matinale le long des quais de la Seine ☀️ #Paris #Promenade, followed by a 4-image collage in one row: 1) Eiffel Tower by the river at golden hour, 2) a Paris riverside walkway with a bridge and autumn trees, 3) a cozy terrace café with Eiffel Tower view, 4) a coffee cup beside an open notebook overlooking water. Below it, show engagement icons and counts: reply 258, repost 642, like 3,1 k. Post 2 is from verified news account "Le Monde" with handle "@LeMonde", black circular avatar with white monogram, and French text: "Dernières infos : Le nouveau gouvernement français a été annoncé 📰 Tous les details ici ↓" followed by a blue link "lemonde.fr/article123"; below it show counts 187, 512, and 2,7 k. Post 3 is from "Thomas Lefevre" with handle "@Thomas_Lf" and text "Juste incroyable ! 😍 Le Mont-Saint-Michel vu du ciel 📷", followed by a wide aerial photo of Mont-Saint-Michel. At the bottom, include an iOS-style navigation bar with exactly 5 elements: home icon, search icon, notifications bell with a red badge showing 4, messages envelope with a red badge showing 4, and a large floating blue compose button with a white quill/feather icon. Add the thin black iPhone home indicator centered at the very bottom. Use crisp modern UI typography, subtle gray dividers, realistic spacing, authentic X-like iconography, polished mobile app rendering, and near-photographic screenshot realism.

entries.title: AI Chat Screenshot with Cosmic Artwork
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vertical smartphone screenshot of an AI chat app interface in light mode, showing the moment an image has just been generated. At the very top is a simple mobile app header with a hamburger menu icon on the left, the blue title "Thinking" with a right chevron beside it, and on the right a compose icon and a three-dot menu. Below that is the bottom portion of a rounded light-gray user message bubble containing Japanese text, visible across 4 lines: 「水彩や線画、油彩、カラー版画、 金箔アクセントなどを取り入れ てテクスチャも入れて立体的に、 芸術爆発させて」. Under the bubble, on a white background, place the gray system status line "Thought for a couple of seconds", then a darker gray Japanese line "画像が作成されました". Below that, centered and taking most of the lower half of the screen, display a large rounded-corner generated artwork preview. The artwork itself is an ultra-detailed cosmic visionary collage in a square format: a tiny glowing human figure stands at the vanishing point in the center bottom-middle, radiating light; two large semi-transparent human profiles or heads face inward from left and right midground; swirling galaxies, stars, nebulae, planets, floating geometric frames, transparent spheres, gold-leaf fragments, line art, splattered paint, and layered textures fill the scene. Use a dramatic palette of deep indigo, ultramarine, violet, magenta, white, and luminous gold, with explosive painterly energy combining watercolor, oil painting, printmaking, ink lines, and metallic foil accents. Include branching tree-like forms, abstract architectural steps on the right, a lotus-like flower on the left, multiple framed mini-scenes embedded in space, and dense luminous particle trails converging toward the central figure. The overall screenshot should feel like a real iPhone app capture, clean and minimal outside the artwork, with the generated image being the visual focal point.

entries.title: Candid Convenience Store Cashier
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A photorealistic candid scene of a young Indonesian woman in her early 20s working as a convenience store cashier. She wears a standard 7-Eleven uniform - a clean white shirt with green, red, and orange stripes, and a name tag that reads "FELISHA." Her hair is neatly tied back, and she has a soft, natural appearance. She stands behind the cashier counter, scanning a packaged item with a barcode scanner while holding it in her other hand. Her expression is calm and friendly, with a slight gentle smile as she focuses on serving a customer. Candid moment: The image is captured from a customer's perspective using a smartphone, giving it an unposed, spontaneous feel. The framing is slightly imperfect with a subtle tilt, mild foreground blur from nearby items, and a touch of motion blur for realism. The shot feels discreet and natural, like a real-life moment. Environment: A modern convenience store interior with bright, even fluorescent lighting. Behind her are neatly organized shelves filled with snacks, drinks, and various products. The counter includes a POS machine, barcode scanner, and small impulse-buy items like candy and bottled beverages, contributing to a clean, well-stocked atmosphere. Photography style: Photorealistic, candid smartphone photography, shallow depth of field, natural skin tones, high detail, slight noise typical of phone cameras, subtle reflections on nearby surfaces, 4K quality.
